item.title: Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bel...
item.description:
Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper -Onion -Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes) -Garlic -Paprika -Coriander -Cumin seeds / ground cumin -Chili powder -Oregano -Salt -Eggs Toppings -Parsley -Mint -Yogurt Serve with some crusty bread or pita!
#cooking #shakshuka #recipe #breakfast
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ing...
item.description:
Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ingredients -Eggplant -Fresh tomatoes, Passata, Pomodorini… depends on preference and availability (: -Mozzarella -Parmigiano Reggiano DOP -Basil -Salt -Black Pepper -Flour -Frying Oil -Extra Virgin Olive Oil
#cooking #recipe #italy #eggplant #parmigiano #travel
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: VADA PAV 🇮🇳 For the Potato Mix -Floury potatoes -Garlic -Ginger ...
item.description:
VADA PAV 🇮🇳 For the Potato Mix -Floury potatoes -Garlic -Ginger -Green chilies -Ghee -Fresh curry leaves -Black mustard Seeds -Ground turmeric -Ground coriander -chaat masala -cilantro/coriander For the Batter -Chickpea (besan/gram) flour -Deggi mirch or Kashmiri chilli powder -Ground turmeric -Baking powder -Fine sea salt For the Dry Garlic Chutney: -Kashmiri dried red chilies -Garlic cloves -Desiccated coconut -Cumin seeds -Salt For the Green Chutney: -Fresh cilantro/coriander -Fresh mint -Green chilies -Garlic -Lime -Salt To Assemble and Serve -Pav/Pau bread buns or any soft white bread buns -Chutneys -Fried green chilies
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: STEAK AU POIVRE BURGER INGREDIENTS For the caramelized onions ...
item.description:
STEAK AU POIVRE BURGER INGREDIENTS For the caramelized onions -Yellow onions -Extra virgin olive oil -Unsalted butter -Thyme (optional) For the matchstick fries: double fry, 1st at 325°F (163°C) 2nd at 375°F (190°C) -Russet potatoes -Neutral oil for frying -Flaky sea salt For the burger patties: -80/20 ground beef -Coarse sea salt -Black pepper -Beef tallow/ neutral oil -Unsalted butter -Garlic cloves -Fresh thyme and/or rosemary -Gruyere, Raclette, Comte, or Swiss cheese For the peppercorn sauce: -Shallots -Garlic -Green peppercorns in brine -Coarsely cracked black pepper -Cognac -Heavy cream -Dijon mustard For the buns: -Whole milk -Water -Bread flour -Instant yeast -Granulated sugar -Fine sea salt -Eggs -Unsalted butter Egg wash: -Egg -Whole milk -Melted butter for finishing
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: SPANAKOPITA INGREDIENTS For the Filling: Fresh spinach (can als...
item.description:
SPANAKOPITA INGREDIENTS For the Filling: Fresh spinach (can also use frozen) Leeks White onion Scallions / green onions Garlic Feta (from a block in brine) Eggs Fresh dill Fresh flat-leaf parsley Fresh mint Pine nuts (optional) Nutmeg Salt Black pepper Extra virgin olive oil For the Pastry: Filo pastry Extra virgin olive oil for brushing
#spanakopita #recipeideas
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: LAMB BIRYANI For the garam masala -Black cardamom pods -Green c...
item.description:
LAMB BIRYANI For the garam masala -Black cardamom pods -Green cardamom -Cloves -Black peppercorns -Cinnamon sticks -Coriander seeds -Cumin seeds -Fennel seeds -Star anise -Bay leaf -Mace blades -Poppy seeds -Nutmeg -Dried rose petals (optional but great) For the birista (crispy fried onions) -White or red onions -Neutral oil to fry -Salt For the lamb -Lamb shanks, bone in -Ghee/oil (to sear) -Full-fat Greek yoghurt -Ginger paste -Garlic paste -Kashmiri chili powder -Ground turmeric -Garam masala -Onion oil (some of the leftover oil from the onions, great infused flavor!) -Salt -Stock For the rice -Basmati rice (rinsed 3 times, soaked 45 min) -Water -Salt -Lime -Star anise -Green chili -Bay leaf -Black cardamom -Green cardamom -Cinnamon stick (I forgot it but this is great) For the layers & finishing -Saffron -Milk or water -Ghee -Kewra water (optional)
#biryani
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: AREPAS Ingredients For the beef: -flank steak -white or yello...
item.description:
AREPAS Ingredients For the beef: -flank steak -white or yellow onion -green bell pepper -garlic -salt -black pepper -cumin -oregano -tomato paste -canned tomatoes -bay leaf -beef tallow (or other neutral oil/fat) to sear For the arepa dough: -masarepa -butter -warm water -salt For the salsa: -avocado -garlic cloves -green bell pepper -cilantro -salt -black pepper -extra virgin olive oil -white vinegar -fresh lime juice -splash of water (if needed to loosen)
#arepas #recipe
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: JERK CHICKEN 🇯🇲 INGREDIENTS For the marinade: Scotch bonnet pep...
item.description:
JERK CHICKEN 🇯🇲 INGREDIENTS For the marinade: Scotch bonnet peppers (can sub habaneros) Fresh thyme Garlic cloves Fresh ginger Scallions Yellow onion Brown sugar Whole or Ground allspice Ground cinnamon Ground nutmeg Black pepper Salt Lime juice White vinegar Sorrel tea For the Rice : Long-grain white rice Red kidney beans Full-fat coconut milk Water or chicken stock Garlic cloves Fresh thyme Scallions Scotch bonnet pepper (whole) Ground or whole allspice Bay leaves Kosher salt Freshly ground black pepper For the Fried Plantains Ripe plantains Neutral oil (such as avocado oil) Salt
#jerkchicken
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: SPAGHETTI ALL’ASSASSINA INGREDIENTS For the pasta: -Extra virgi...
item.description:
SPAGHETTI ALL’ASSASSINA INGREDIENTS For the pasta: -Extra virgin olive oil -Garlic -Peperoncino or red chili flakes -Passata -Spaghetti For the tomato cooking liquid: -Water -Salt -Tomato paste -Parsley and basil (optional)
#spaghetti #allassassina
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: French Dip Sandwichh 🥖🥩 Ingredients For the beef: -Chuck roast...
item.description:
French Dip Sandwichh 🥖🥩 Ingredients For the beef: -Chuck roast or top round -Beef tallow (to sear) -Onion -Garlic -Beef stock *(homemade ingredients below) -Worcestershire sauce -Bay leaf -Fresh thyme -Fresh rosemary -Black pepper -Salt For the caramelized onions: -Yellow onions -Unsalted butter -Olive oil -Salt -Few cracks of black pepper For the horseradish aioli: -Mayonnaise -Fresh horseradish root -Dijon mustard -Lemon (juice) -Garlic -Salt -Black pepper For assembly: -Cooked beef -Hot au jus -Caramelized onions -Horseradish aioli -Provolone or Gruyère cheese -Flat-leaf parsley -Bread such as French rolls, Hoagie rolls, or Baguette -Butter *For the homemade stock : -Beef bones (marrow bones and/or knuckle bones) -Onion -Carrot -Celery -Tomato paste -Bay leaves -Black peppercorns -Fresh thyme -Flat-leaf parsley stems -Water
#frenchdip #sandwich
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: LOBSTER RISOTTO 🦞 For the lobster: Lobster tails Lobster meat L...
item.description:
LOBSTER RISOTTO 🦞 For the lobster: Lobster tails Lobster meat Lobster shells Unsalted butter Olive oil Garlic Lemon Chives Black pepper For the Lobster Stock: Lobster shells Olive oil Tomato paste Onion Carrot Celery Garlic Dry white wine Bay leaf Black peppercorns Fresh thyme (I forgot this but it’s great) Lemon peel Water For the Risotto: Carnaroli or arborio rice Shallot Butter Extra Virgin Olive oil Dry white wine Lobster stock Saffron Parmigiano-Reggiano Pecorino Romano Black pepper Sea salt To Finish: Chives Lemon zest Extra virgin olive oil Flaky sea salt
#risotto #lobster
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: STEAK AU POIVRE SANDWICH 🥩 INGREDIENTS For the steak: -Ribeye ...
item.description:
STEAK AU POIVRE SANDWICH 🥩 INGREDIENTS For the steak: -Ribeye or NY Strip -Salt -Black peppercorns -Garlic -Rosemary -Butter (to baste) -Beef tallow or avocado oil (to sear) For the sauce: -Shallot -Cognac -Butter -Green peppercorns in brine -Beef stock -Heavy cream -Dijon mustard For the fries -Russet potatoes -Salt -High-temp frying oil For the onions -Yellow onions -Extra virgin olive oil -Butter -Salt -Fresh thyme -Cognac
#steakaupoivre #sandwich
